content:textarea:23:15.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:23:15.html: Food Drive: Help The Salvation Army provide emergency food for individuals and families in need by collecting non-perishable food, baby food, paper products (i.e. toilet paper, paper towels), diapers, etc.
content:textarea:23:15.content: Food Drive: Help The Salvation Army provide emergency food for individuals and families in need by collecting non-perishable food, baby food, paper products (i.e. toilet paper, paper towels), diapers, etc.

content:textarea:24:50.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:24:50.html: Family Thrift Store Drive: Assist The Salvation Army with funding our Social Service programs by collecting gently used clothing and household items to be sold in our family thrift stores.

content:textarea:28:49.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:28:49.html: We need on-call volunteers to assist serving breakfast and supper to the homeless at the Rapid Shelter Columbia OVERFLOW. The overflow is scheduled to open on November 1, depending on the weather. (Temperatures at 40 degrees and below)
content:textarea:28:49.content: We need on-call volunteers to assist serving breakfast and supper to the homeless at the Rapid Shelter Columbia OVERFLOW. The overflow is scheduled to open on November 1, depending on the weather. (Temperatures at 40 degrees and below)

content:textarea:36:60.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:36:60.html: **  Rapid Shelter – Overflow volunteers will be provided an overview training and be requested to attend a “Trauma Informed” training.  This training will provide insight into past/current trauma that has an impact on how a person experiencing homelessness lives their life and engages with service providers.
content:textarea:36:60.content: **  Rapid Shelter – Overflow volunteers will be provided an overview training and be requested to attend a “Trauma Informed” training.  This training will provide insight into past/current trauma that has an impact on how a person experiencing homelessness lives their life and engages with service providers.

content:textarea:39:39.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:39:39.html: Stocking Stuffer: Individuals or groups can reserve Christmas stockings to be stuffed with various toys and/or other needed items as deemed appropriate based on the age of the children.

content:textarea:41:95.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:41:95.html: Adopt an Angel: Each Angel represents a specific child who lives in poverty in our community that would not have presents to open on Christmas day if it weren’t for programs such as this.
content:textarea:41:95.content: Adopt an Angel: Each Angel represents a specific child who lives in poverty in our community that would not have presents to open on Christmas day if it weren’t for programs such as this.

content:textarea:47:54.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:47:54.html: Red Kettle Bell Ringer: Be a part of The Salvation Army’s largest, and most festive fundraiser of the year!
content:textarea:47:54.content: Red Kettle Bell Ringer: Be a part of The Salvation Army’s largest, and most festive fundraiser of the year!
content:textarea:47:54.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:48:47.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:48:47.html: Volunteer as an individual, with a business, church, service club, school, or other group to ring the bell at various locations throughout the Midlands and surrounding communities.
content:textarea:48:47.content: Volunteer as an individual, with a business, church, service club, school, or other group to ring the bell at various locations throughout the Midlands and surrounding communities.
content:textarea:48:47.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:49:19.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:49:19.html: Stuff-A-Bus: Through partnering with WLTX TV over many, many years, this campaign has become the largest one of the seasons for collecting toys and bikes- toys and bikes that contribute to the thousands of Angels to be adopted at Christmas time!
content:textarea:49:19.content: Stuff-A-Bus: Through partnering with WLTX TV over many, many years, this campaign has become the largest one of the seasons for collecting toys and bikes- toys and bikes that contribute to the thousands of Angels to be adopted at Christmas time!
content:textarea:49:19.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:50:71.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:50:71.html: There are multiple locations where the buses will be located to collect toys on two, designated Saturdays in early December.
content:textarea:50:71.content: There are multiple locations where the buses will be located to collect toys on two, designated Saturdays in early December.
content:textarea:50:71.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:51:56.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:51:56.html: Christmas Warehouse Volunteer: From the combination of programs and efforts, the Christmas warehouse is where all the stockings, toys, bikes and other gifts are located the families in each holiday season.
content:textarea:51:56.content: Christmas Warehouse Volunteer: From the combination of programs and efforts, the Christmas warehouse is where all the stockings, toys, bikes and other gifts are located the families in each holiday season.
content:textarea:51:56.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:52:96.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:52:96.html: Assist at TSA’s Christmas Warehouse, where you will sort gifts, assemble gift bags and/or distribute gifts in preparation for distribution.
content:textarea:52:96.content: Assist at TSA’s Christmas Warehouse, where you will sort gifts, assemble gift bags and/or distribute gifts in preparation for distribution.
content:textarea:52:96.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:53:82.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:53:82.html: Emergency Disaster Services: During these times, The Salvation Army provides, hot meals, snacks, drinks, and spiritual & emotional support to disaster survivors and emergency first responders. TSA relies on trained and credentialed disaster workers to provide much-needed services to those impacted by an emergency or disaster. The Salvation Army recruits and deploys personnel through its local units.
content:textarea:53:82.content: Emergency Disaster Services: During these times, The Salvation Army provides, hot meals, snacks, drinks, and spiritual & emotional support to disaster survivors and emergency first responders. TSA relies on trained and credentialed disaster workers to provide much-needed services to those impacted by an emergency or disaster. The Salvation Army recruits and deploys personnel through its local units.
content:textarea:53:82.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:54:52.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:54:52.html: If you are a new volunteer and registering today, it will take several weeks to become a credentialed volunteer. The Salvation Army only deploys trained and credentialed disaster workers affiliated with a local unit.
content:textarea:54:52.content: If you are a new volunteer and registering today, it will take several weeks to become a credentialed volunteer. The Salvation Army only deploys trained and credentialed disaster workers affiliated with a local unit.
content:textarea:54:52.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:55:71.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:55:71.html: Please Note: If you have not been trained or just signed up to become a disaster volunteer today, it is unlikely that The Salvation Army will deploy you to a current disaster site. However, most often there are still opportunities for you to serve locally here at The Salvation Army of the Midlands.
content:textarea:55:71.content: Please Note: If you have not been trained or just signed up to become a disaster volunteer today, it is unlikely that The Salvation Army will deploy you to a current disaster site. However, most often there are still opportunities for you to serve locally here at The Salvation Army of the Midlands.
content:textarea:55:71.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:67:58-1:1 column - 1 row:0
